_doc: Recorded MockOrchestrator bundle for the bake-to-completion skill suite. Keyed by (caseId, role) for runners and (caseId, swapped) for judges. Traces are normalized RunTraces (RunTraceSchema). See README.md for the refresh procedure.

Even with positions swapped, the interview-led answer was stronger.
